# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prep
  - build
  - test
  - release
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"
  RELEASE_NOTES_FILE: release_notes.md

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"'
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web"'
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "pipeline"'
    - when: never

.default_before_script:
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git curl jq bash coreutils openssh-client

prepare_mr_metadata:
  stage: prep
  image: alpine:3.20
  extends: .default_before_script
  rules:
    - when: always
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail

      MR_TITLE="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-}"
      MR_DESC="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-}"
      MR_IID="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-}"
      MR_URL="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_PROJECT_URL:-}${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:+/-/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"

      if [ -z "${MR_TITLE}" ] || [ -z "${MR_DESC}" ]; then
        if [ -n "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-}" ] && [ -n "${CI_API_V4_URL:-}" ] && [ -n "${CI_PROJECT_ID:-}" ] && [ -n "${CI_JOB_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
          MR_JSON="$(curl -sfS --header "JOB-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}")"
          MR_TITLE="${MR_TITLE:-$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.title // empty')}"
          MR_DESC="${MR_DESC:-$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.description // empty')}"
          MR_URL="${MR_URL:-$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.web_url // empty')}"
        fi
      fi

      if [ -z "${MR_TITLE}" ]; then
        MR_TITLE="${CI_COMMIT_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE:-}}"
      fi

      if [ -z "${MR_DESC}" ]; then
        MR_DESC="${CI_COMMIT_DESCRIPTION:-}"
      fi

      if [ -z "${MR_TITLE}" ]; then
        MR_TITLE="(no title)"
      fi

      SAFE_TITLE="$(echo "${MR_TITLE}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed -E 's/[^a-z0-9]+/-/g; s/^-+//; s/-+$//' | cut -c1-48)"
      DEPLOY_TAG="deploy-${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME:-env}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${SAFE_TITLE}"

      {
        echo "MR_TITLE<<'EOF'"
        echo "${MR_TITLE}"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_DESC<<'EOF'"
        echo "${MR_DESC}"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_IID=${MR_IID}"
        echo "MR_URL=${MR_URL}"
        echo "SAFE_TITLE=${SAFE_TITLE}"
        echo "DEPLOY_TAG=${DEPLOY_TAG}"
      } > mr.env

      {
        echo "# Release Notes"
        echo
        echo "## ${MR_TITLE}"
        echo
        if [ -n "${MR_URL}" ]; then
          echo "- MR: ${MR_URL}"
        fi
        if [ -n "${MR_IID}" ]; then
          echo "- MR IID: !${MR_IID}"
        fi
        echo "- Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
        echo
        if [ -n "${MR_DESC}" ]; then
          echo "### Description"
          echo
          echo "${MR_DESC}"
          echo
        fi
      } > "${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: mr.env
    paths:
      - $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
    expire_in: 1 week

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  extends: .default_before_script
  needs: ["prepare_mr_metadata"]
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      echo "Build notification:"
      echo "Title: ${MR_TITLE}"
      echo "Description: ${MR_DESC}"
      echo "MR: ${MR_URL}"
      echo "Deploy tag (planned): ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
      echo "Building..."

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:3.20
  extends: .default_before_script
  needs: ["prepare_mr_metadata"]
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      echo "Testing for: ${MR_TITLE}"
      echo "Running tests..."

create_release_commit:
  stage: release
  image: alpine:3.20
  extends: .default_before_script
  needs: ["prepare_mr_metadata", "build", "test"]
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: on_success
    - when: never
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail

      git config user.email "${GITLAB_USER_EMAIL:-ci@example.com}"
      git config user.name  "${GITLAB_USER_NAME:-GitLab CI}"

      git fetch origin "${CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH}"
      git checkout "${CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH}"

      mkdir -p release
      cp -f "${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}" "release/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}.md"

      git add "release/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}.md"

      COMMIT_MSG="chore(release): ${MR_TITLE}"
      {
        echo "${COMMIT_MSG}"
        echo
        echo "MR: ${MR_URL}"
        echo
        echo "${MR_DESC}"
      } > /tmp/commitmsg.txt

      if git diff --cached --quiet; then
        echo "No release note changes to commit."
        exit 0
      fi

      git commit -F /tmp/commitmsg.txt
      git push "https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git" "${CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH}"

tag_deployment:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.20
  extends: .default_before_script
  needs: ["prepare_mr_metadata", "build", "test"]
  environment:
    name: production
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: on_success
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
    - when: never
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail

      git config user.email "${GITLAB_USER_EMAIL:-ci@example.com}"
      git config user.name  "${GITLAB_USER_NAME:-GitLab CI}"

      git fetch --tags origin
      TAG="${DEPLOY_TAG}"

      {
        echo "Deploying:"
        echo "Title: ${MR_TITLE}"
        echo "Description: ${MR_DESC}"
        echo "MR: ${MR_URL}"
        echo "Tag: ${TAG}"
      }

      git tag -a "${TAG}" -m "Deploy: ${MR_TITLE}" -m "MR: ${MR_URL}" -m "${MR_DESC}" "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
      git push "https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git" "${TAG}"

      echo "Deployment complete for: ${MR_TITLE}"
